text:
Like squares, closed figures
that have all s
sides and all angles equal
called regular polygons. We studied the sequence of regular
are
polygons as ‘Shape Sequence' #1 in Chapter 1. Examples of regular
polygons are
the equilateral t
triangle
e (where all t
three sides and all
three angles are e
equal), regular pentagon
n (where all five sides and
all five angles are
equal), etc.
